storage.path_rule: Each evidence.local_path is relative to EVIDENCE_ROOT_DIR. Do not store absolute machine paths in this manifest.

source_quote: Dimensions (Net) (W X H X D) 550×1456x562 mm
evidence.notes: First approved PDF evidence trial. Strict extraction is from the official Hisense AU spec sheet. It intentionally surfaces a mismatch with the legacy catalog dimensions for manual data correction review.
Official Hisense AU download API URL for the HRBM417C/HRBM417S/HRBM418D manual. Candidate only: extraction must confirm model-specific dimensions and clearances before approval.
Official Samsung-hosted SRF7300SA guide seeded for the SRF7300 family. Exact SRF7300BSS official PDF was not found; keep candidate status until extraction/manual review confirms applicability.
Official LG AU product information sheet download URL found on the GF-L706PL product page. Awaiting extraction and validation before approval.

Official Fisher & Paykel AU quick reference guide for RF730QNUVB1, the same 690L quad-door physical platform as RF730QNUVX1. Used because the exact RF730QNUVX1 data sheet is diagram-heavy and text extraction returns null height/depth.
Trusted fallback Westinghouse user manual hosted by Appliances Online; WSF6604WB manual used for WSF6604XB same-series dimensional extraction.

Official Fisher & Paykel Australia quick reference guide for RF730QZUVB1/RF730QZUVX1 family. Retailer URLs for this catalog item point to RF730QZUVB1; manual review should confirm finish/model mapping.
Official Haier Australia QRG for HRF520BS bottom-freezer family. Retailer URLs include HRF520BHS/HRF520BS, while catalog title says French Door; requires manual reconciliation before approval.
Official LG support CDN PDF resolved from LG AU manual API.
Official LG support CDN PDF resolved from LG AU manual API.
Official LG support CDN PDF resolved from LG AU manual API; same official manual family as GF-LN500MBL.
